creator: geriw34762@giratex.com
text:
Hello,

Thank you for reporting this issue. We appreciate the detailed information you've provided. Our team will investigate the problem further and work to address it. In the meantime, if you have any additional insights or observations, please feel free to share them with us.

Stay tuned for updates on our progress.

Best regards,

P.S. By the way, if you need a break from the tech talk, consider taking a fun distraction with the rice purity test (https://ricepurity-test.org/). It might add a bit of lightheartedness to your day!
